Company Name: TechBuild Infrastructure Solutions Pvt Ltd

About Us:
We are a leading infrastructure and civil engineering company specializing in road construction, highway development, and bridge building across Maharashtra and Gujarat. Established in 2010, we have successfully delivered over 45 projects for government and private clients.

Core Capabilities:
- Road construction and highway project execution
- Cement concrete pavement laying
- Bridge and flyover construction
- Earthwork and grading operations
- Storm water drainage systems
- Traffic signaling infrastructure

Certifications Held:
- ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management System)
- ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental Management System)
- ISO 45001:2018 (Occupational Health & Safety)
- NSIC Registration
- MSME Certificate

Financial Details:
- Average Annual Turnover (Last 3 Years): INR 62 Crores
- Net Worth: Positive as per last audited balance sheet (FY 2024-25)
- Solvency Certificate: Available from State Bank of India

Past Project Experience:
1. NH-48 Highway Widening Project, Pune - INR 28 Crores (Government of Maharashtra, 2023)
2. Cement Concrete Road Construction, Nashik Municipal Corporation - INR 12 Crores (2022)
3. Expressway Service Road Development, NHAI - INR 19 Crores (2024)

Location and Geographic Presence:
- Registered Office: Pune, Maharashtra
- Operational Areas: Maharashtra, Gujarat, Goa
- State GSTIN: 27AABCT3518Q1ZU

Preferred Tender Categories:
- Road and Highway Construction
- Bridge and Culvert Works
- Civil Infrastructure Projects
- Smart City Road Development
